calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Trish Abalos.
Petitioner: Yanping Huang, present in pro per and with Cantonese Interpreter: Shirley Xie.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the Minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Connie Yanping Huang.
Decree signed in open court.
